content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Rebel_Assault.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' released in 1994.]]

A list of events in '''1994''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] is published.
*[[January 27|27]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunter]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi 5|''Tales of the Jedi'' 5]] published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 16|''Classic Star Wars'' 16]] is published.
*[[February 11|11]] – [[William Conrad]] dies.
*[[February 25|25]] – [[Alex Knoll]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] is published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Search]]'' is published.
*01 – [[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded|''A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, 2nd Edition'']] is published.
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars 17|''Classic Star Wars'' 17]] is published.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Frankie Ryan Manriquez]] is born.
*?? – ''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)]]'' is published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 18|''Classic Star Wars'' 18]] is published.
*?? – [[Droids (1994) 1|''Droids'' (1994) 1]] is published.
*?? – ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters (Second Edition)]]'' is published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Droids (1994) 2|''Droids'' (1994) 2]] is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars 19|''Classic Star Wars'' 19]] is published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] is published.
*[[May 24|24]] – [[Lily Newmark]] is born.

==June==
*01 - [[Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit]] is published.
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Classic Star Wars 20|''Classic Star Wars'' 20]] is published.
*17 – ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' is published.
*[[June 21|21]] – [[Droids (1994) 3|''Droids'' (1994) 3]] is published.
*[[June 28|28]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 1|''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope'' 1]] is published.
*?? – ''[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles Companion]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)]]'' is published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 2|''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope'' 2]] is published.
*01 – [[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] is published.
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Droids (1994) 4|''Droids'' (1994) 4]] is published.
*[[July 18|18]] – ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] is released.
*?? – ''[[The Stele Chronicles]]'' booklet released.
*?? – [[Dark Empire (audio)|''Dark Empire audio drama'']] is released on Cassette.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] is published.
*01 – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — Knights of the Old Republic (TPB)|''Tales of the Jedi: Knights of the Old Republic (TPB)'']] is published.
*[[August 2|02]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] is published.
*[[August 9|09]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 1]] is published.
*[[August 11|11]] – [[Peter Cushing]] dies.
*[[August 16|16]] – [[Droids (1994) 5|''Droids'' (1994) 5]] is published.
*[[August 30|30]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1]] is published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Champions of the Force]]'' published.
*01 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 2|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 2]] is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 2|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' 2]] is published.
*[[September 10|10]] – [[Keira Wingate]] is born.
*[[September 30|30]] – [[Sydney Walker]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' is published.
*?? – [[Droids (1994) 6|''Droids'' (1994) 6]] is published.

==October==
*?? – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope]]'' is published.
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 3|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 3]] is published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 1]] is published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]'' is published.
*?? – [[Tarik]] dies.
==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] is published.
*01 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 4|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4]] is published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] is published.
*01 – ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' paperback published.
*?? – ''[[Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]'' is released.

==December==
*[[December 8|08]] – ''[[The Crystal Star]]'' hardcover is published.
*[[December 13|13]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5]] is published.
*[[December 13|13]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] is published.
*[[December 20|20]] – [[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] is published.
*[[December 23|23]] – [[Sebastian Shaw]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'' is published.
*?? – ''[[Classic Campaigns]]'' is published.

==Unknown==
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 21|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 21]] published in Winter.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 22|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 22]] published in Spring.
*?? – [[Star Wars Insider 23|''Star Wars Insider'' 23]] published in Fall.
*?? – [[Moses Ingram]] is born.

----
{{Years-RealWorld}}

|pl=1994
}}
